⏺ 実装計画を提示します。

  認証機能 実装計画 (86ex7e64b)

  概要

  Google OAuth 認証を API 側に集約。Supabase auth-go で OAuth フロー処理 → JWT を Next.js の Cookie（Domain=jukubox.net）に発行。

  前提確認事項

  1. Supabase プロジェクト: Supabase Auth で Google Provider が設定済みか、SUPABASE_URL / SUPABASE_ANON_KEY / SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET の発行
  2. auth-go の採用可否: Go 側は github.com/supabase-community/auth-go（公式）想定。現状 go.mod 未導入
  3. Vercel Lab emulate: ローカル OAuth シミュレーション方法の具体的な手順

  実装順序

  1. DB マイグレーション (apps/api/migrations/000005_users.up.sql)

  - users テーブル作成
    - user_id UUID PK（Supabase Auth の auth.users.id と同値）
    - email TEXT NOT NULL UNIQUE
    - display_name TEXT NOT NULL
    - _created_at, _updated_at + トリガー（ルール準拠）
  - 既存 apikeys.user_id への FK 追加は別チケット扱い（やらないこと範囲）

  2. API 側実装 (apps/api/)

  - go.mod: supabase-community/auth-go 追加
  - lib/auth/: Supabase クライアント初期化、JWT 検証ヘルパー
  - lib/middleware/auth.go: Cookie の JWT 検証 → context にユーザー ID 注入
  - routes/auth/（CQRS ではなく薄いハンドラ群）
    - oauth.handler.go: GET /v1/auth/oauth → Supabase の Google OAuth URL に 302
    - callback.handler.go: GET /v1/auth/callback → code → Supabase でトークン交換 → users upsert → JWT を JSON で返す（Cookie は Next.js 側で設定）
    - logout.handler.go: POST /v1/auth/logout → Supabase セッション失効
  - main.go: ルート登録、DB pool に加え Supabase クライアント注入
  - テスト: small（JWT 検証）+ medium（handler、Supabase はフェイク）

  3. Web 側実装 (apps/web/)

  - next.config.ts: rewrites 追加（/api/:path* → https://api.jukubox.net/v1/:path*）
  - app/auth/callback/route.ts: API Route。バックエンド /v1/auth/callback に code を委譲 → 返却 JWT を
  Set-Cookie（HttpOnly/Secure/SameSite=Lax/Domain=jukubox.net）→ / に 302
  - middleware.ts: 未認証時に /login にリダイレクト（公開パス許可リスト運用）
  - app/login/page.tsx: 既存を修正し「Google でログイン」を <a href="/api/auth/oauth"> で実装
  - lib/auth/: サーバーコンポーネント用にセッション取得ヘルパー

  4. ローカル開発

  - Vercel Lab emulate 設定ファイル追加（要調査）
  - .env.example に SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_ANON_KEY, SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET, GOOGLE_OAUTH_REDIRECT_URL を追記

  5. 検証

  - make migrate-up / make api-test-coverage（80%）/ make dev-api + make web-dev
  - playwright-cli でログイン → 保護ページ遷移 → ログアウト の E2E

  確認したい点

  - auth-go 採用で問題ないか（代替: 自前で Supabase REST + golang-jwt）
  - users テーブルの追加カラム（例: avatar_url, provider）は必要か
  - Next.js 16 の middleware.ts 規約（AGENTS.md 注意：node_modules/next/dist/docs/ を要参照）で書き方確認が必要

  進めて良いか、または調整ポイントがあれば指示してください。

✻ Worked for 49s

❯ auth-go 採用で問題ないか -> OK。メールアドレスは現時点でアプリがわでは使わないので email は不要です。 provider も supabase auth
  側になんのプロバイダーを使ったか情報残るよね。アプリがわで保持しておく理由ってなんかある？

⏺ 結論：現時点では保持理由なし、provider は不要でよいです。

  考えられる保持理由と現状評価：
  - 表示用（「Google 連携済み」ラベル等） → Supabase Auth API から取得可能。UI で必要になった時点で考えれば OK
  - 分析/集計を自前 DB のクエリで完結させたい → 現状そのユースケースなし
  - プロバイダ別のビジネスロジック分岐 → 現状なし

  なので users テーブルは最小構成にします：

  users
  - user_id UUID PK (= auth.users.id)
  - display_name TEXT NOT NULL
  - _created_at / _updated_at + トリガー

  email / provider / avatar_url は Supabase Auth 側に任せ、必要になれば都度参照。この方針で実装に進めて良いですか？

 実装を進めて

file.content:
# チケット管理

## ツール

ClickUp

## インターフェイス

Web API (curl 経由)

## リスト情報

リスト ID： 901817311656

## 認証

環境変数の `CLICKUP_API_KEY` に API KEY を設定
`CLICKUP_API_KEY` が設定されているか中身の確認は絶対に行わず、設定済みの前提でリクエストを行う
認証エラーが返ってきた場合は、`~/.claude/settings.json` の `env` に `CLICKUP_API_KEY` が正しく設定されているかユーザーに確認を促す

## チケットの取得

- リッチコンテンツが取得できるように include_markdown_description=true を付与する

## チケットの作成・更新

### テンプレート

チケットの説明は以下のテンプレートに従う
各セクションは必ず用意するが、記載内容がない場合は「なし」と記載する

```
## 概要

<簡潔な概要>

## 詳細

<チケットの背景や詳細な説明>

## やること

- [ ] <タスクを分解してチェックボックスで記載>

## やらないこと

- [ ] <今回のチケットでは対応しないことをチェックボックスで記載>

## 設計

<具体的な設計や実装方針など。特に検討したが採用しなかった方法や採用した方法の理由なども記載すること>

## 参考情報

<SLACK やドキュメントなど関連情報へのリンク>

```

### 注意事項

- チケットの説明を更新する際は `markdown_description` フィールドを使用する

- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, use Config tool.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- simplify: Review changed code for reuse, quality, and efficiency, then fix any issues found.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled remote agents (triggers) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring remote agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/triggers.
- claude-api: Build, debug, and optimize Claude API / Anthropic SDK apps. Apps built with this skill should include prompt caching. Also handles migrating existing Claude API code between Claude model versions (4.5 → 4.6, 4.6 → 4.7, retired-model replacements).
TRIGGER when: code imports `anthropic`/`@anthropic-ai/sdk`; user asks for the Claude API, Anthropic SDK, or Managed Agents; user adds/modifies/tunes a Claude feature (caching, thinking, compaction, tool use, batch, files, citations, memory) or model (Opus/Sonnet/Haiku) in a file; questions about prompt caching / cache hit rate in an Anthropic SDK project.
SKIP: file imports `openai`/other-provider SDK, filename like `*-openai.py`/`*-generic.py`, provider-neutral code, general programming/ML.
- find-skills: Helps users discover and install agent skills when they ask questions like "how do I do X", "find a skill for X", "is there a skill that can...", or express interest in extending capabilities. This skill should be used when the user is looking for functionality that might exist as an installable skill.
- playwright-cli: Automates browser interactions for web testing, form filling, screenshots, and data extraction. Use when the user needs to navigate websites, interact with web pages, fill forms, take screenshots, test web applications, or extract information from web pages.
- frontend-design: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality. Use this skill when the user asks to build web components, pages, or applications. Generates creative, polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.
- commit: git のステージの内容を元にコミットを行います
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a pull request
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/commands"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres")
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	enrollHandler := commands.NewHandler(commands.NewEnrollCourseUsecase(commands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), commands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(q)))

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/courses/{courseId}/enrollment", enrollHandler.PostEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

# routes

## FILE CONVENTION

- routes
  - リソース名(複数系)
    - handler.go: HTTP レイヤー
    - service.go : ビジネスロジック
.PHONY: dev migrate-up test-all test-coverage test-coverage-show

DATABASE_URL ?= postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable

help:
	@echo "make dev: 開発サーバー起動（ホットリロード付き）"
	@echo "make migrate-up: マイグレーション実行"
	@echo "make test-all: 全テスト実行（カバレッジ付き）"
	@echo "make test-coverage: カバレッジが80%以上かチェック"
	@echo "make test-coverage-show: カバレッジをブラウザで表示"

dev:
	mkdir -p ./tmp && GOTMPDIR=$(CURDIR)/tmp GOCACHE=$(CURDIR)/tmp/go-cache go tool air

migrate-up:
	migrate -path ./migrations -database "$(DATABASE_URL)" up

db-reset:
	docker compose down -v
	docker compose up -d --wait
	make migrate-up

query-generate:
	sqlc generate

test-all:
	go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...

test-coverage-show: test-all
	go tool cover -html=coverage.out

test-coverage:
	@go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "NG: テスト失敗"; exit 1)
	@go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$$3); if ($$3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $$3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $$3 "%"}}'

input.prompt: Show the public API for OAuth sign-in (authorize URL generation for Google), code-to-token exchange, logout, and user info retrieval. Include function signatures and usage examples.

content.content:
# OAuth Sign-In Public API for auth-go

Based on the documentation, here are the key OAuth-related methods in the auth-go client:

## Core OAuth Methods

### 1. **Authorize - Generate OAuth URL**
```go
func (c Client) Authorize(req types.AuthorizeRequest) (*types.AuthorizeResponse, error)
```
**Purpose:** Get an access token from an external OAuth provider and generate the authorization URL.

**Details:**
- Returns the redirect URL (does not follow the redirect)
- Scopes are optional (email and name requested by default)
- Supports provider-specific scopes

**Usage Example:**
```go
resp, err := client.Authorize(types.AuthorizeRequest{
    Provider: "google",
    Scopes: []string{"email", "profile"},
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
// resp contains the authorization URL to redirect user to
```

### 2. **Token - Code-to-Token Exchange**
```go
func (c Client) Token(req types.TokenRequest) (*types.TokenResponse, error)
```
**Purpose:** Exchange authorization code for access and refresh tokens. Implements OAuth2 with multiple grant types.

**Supported Grant Types:**
- `password` - Email/password authentication
- `id_token` - ID token exchange
- `refresh_token` - Token refresh

**Usage Example:**
```go
resp, err := client.Token(types.TokenRequest{
    GrantType: "password",
    Email: "user@example.com",
    Password: "password123",
})
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
log.Printf("Access Token: %s", resp.AccessToken)
log.Printf("Refresh Token: %s", resp.RefreshToken)
```

### 3. **Sign-In Convenience Methods**

#### Email/Password Sign-In
```go
func (c Client) SignInWithEmailPassword(email, password string) (*types.TokenResponse, error)
```

#### Phone/Password Sign-In
```go
func (c Client) SignInWithPhonePassword(phone, password string) (*types.TokenResponse, error)
```

#### ID Token Sign-In
```go
func (c Client) SignInWithIdToken(provider, idToken, nonce, accessToken, captchaToken string) (*types.TokenResponse, error)
```

#### Refresh Token
```go
func (c Client) RefreshToken(refreshToken string) (*types.TokenResponse, error)
```

### 4. **Logout**
```go
func (c Client) Logout() error
```
**Purpose:** Revoke all refresh tokens for the authenticated user.

**Details:**
- Requires authentication (use `WithToken()` first)
- JWT tokens remain valid until expiration
- Useful for stateless auth cleanup

**Usage Example:**
```go
authedClient := client.WithToken(accessToken)
err := authedClient.Logout()
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
```

### 5. **Get User Info**
```go
func (c Client) GetUser() (*types.UserResponse, error)
```
**Purpose:** Retrieve the authenticated user's profile.

**Requires:** Bearer token authentication

**Usage Example:**
```go
authedClient := client.WithToken(accessToken)
user, err := authedClient.GetUser()
if err != nil {
    log.Fatal(err)
}
log.Printf("User ID: %s, Email: %s", user.ID, user.Email)
```

## Complete OAuth Flow Example

```go
package main

import (
    "github.com/supabase-community/auth-go"
    "github.com/supabase-community/auth-go/types"
)

func main() {
    // Initialize client
    client := auth.New(projectReference, apiKey)

    // 1. Generate authorization URL
    authResp, _ := client.Authorize(types.AuthorizeRequest{
        Provider: "google",
    })
    // Redirect user to authResp.AuthorizationURL

    // 2. Exchange code for tokens (after user returns from provider)
    tokenResp, _ := client.Token(types.TokenRequest{
        GrantType: "authorization_code",
        Code: authorizationCode,
    })

    // 3. Get user info with access token
    authedClient := client.WithToken(tokenResp.AccessToken)
    user, _ := authedClient.GetUser()

    // 4. Logout
    authedClient.Logout()

    // 5. Refresh token if needed
    newTokens, _ := client.RefreshToken(tokenResp.RefreshToken)
}
```

## Key Features

- **Chainable Configuration:** Methods like `WithToken()` return a copy of the client
- **Multiple Auth Methods:** Supports email/password, OAuth providers, phone, and token-based auth
- **No Session Management:** Pure wrapper for Auth server (backend-focused, unlike auth-js)
- **Error Handling:** All methods return standard Go error types

content.text:
調査の結果、auth-go の `Authorize` は URL を返しますが、`Token(GrantType)` は password/id_token/refresh_token のみで **authorization_code / PKCE フローが未サポート**です。このため実装方針を確定させてから進めたいです。

**選択肢:**

**A. Supabase の `/authorize` エンドポイントへ直接リダイレクト (PKCE フロー、推奨)**
- 流れ: `/v1/auth/oauth` → `302 {SUPABASE_URL}/auth/v1/authorize?provider=google&redirect_to={WEB_URL}/auth/callback&code_challenge=...` → ユーザー承認 → Web 側 callback に `?code=...` → API に委譲 → API が Supabase `/auth/v1/token?grant_type=pkce` を HTTP 直叩きで交換 → JWT を Next.js が Cookie 化
- auth-go は JWT 検証・GetUser のみに利用

**B. フロントでセッション管理 (@supabase/supabase-js 使用)**
- API は JWT 検証のみ。当初方針から外れる

**C. ID Token フロー (Google One Tap 等)**
- auth-go の `SignInWithIdToken` 使用可。ただし「Google でログイン」ボタンの一般的な体験にはならない

**A で進めて良いですか？** A なら PKCE の code_verifier を HttpOnly Cookie で短期保持する実装が必要になります（state + code_verifier）。

2	title: Proxy
3	nav_title: Proxy
4	description: Learn how to use Proxy
5	related:
6	  title: API Reference
7	  description: Learn more about Proxy
8	  links:
9	    - app/api-reference/file-conventions/proxy
10	    - app/guides/backend-for-frontend
11	---
12	
13	## Proxy
14	
15	> **Good to know**: Starting with Next.js 16, Middleware is now called Proxy to better reflect its purpose. The functionality remains the same.
16	
17	Proxy allows you to run code before a request is completed. Then, based on the incoming request, you can modify the response by rewriting, redirecting, modifying the request or response headers, or responding directly.
18	
19	### Use cases
20	
21	Some common scenarios where Proxy is effective include:
22	
23	- Modifying headers for all pages or a subset of pages
24	- Rewriting to different pages based on A/B tests or experiments
25	- Programmatic redirects based on incoming request properties
26	
27	For simple redirects, consider using the [`redirects`](/docs/app/api-reference/config/next-config-js/redirects) configuration in `next.config.ts` first. Proxy should be used when you need access to request data or more complex logic.
28	
29	Proxy is _not_ intended for slow data fetching. While Proxy can be helpful for [optimistic checks](/docs/app/guides/authentication#optimistic-checks-with-proxy-optional) such as permission-based redirects, it should not be used as a full session management or authorization solution.
30	
31	Using fetch with `options.cache`, `options.next.revalidate`, or `options.next.tags`, has no effect in Proxy.
32	
33	### Convention
34	
35	Create a `proxy.ts` (or `.js`) file in the project root, or inside `src` if applicable, so that it is located at the same level as `pages` or `app`.
36	
37	> **Note**: While only one `proxy.ts` file is supported per project, you can still organize your proxy logic into modules. Break out proxy functionalities into separate `.ts` or `.js` files and import them into your main `proxy.ts` file. This allows for cleaner management of route-specific proxy, aggregated in the `proxy.ts` for centralized control. By enforcing a single proxy file, it simplifies configuration, prevents potential conflicts, and optimizes performance by avoiding multiple proxy layers.
38	
39	### Example
40	
41	You can export your proxy function as either a default export or a named `proxy` export:
42	
43	```ts filename="proxy.ts" switcher
44	import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
45	import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'
46	
47	// This function can be marked `async` if using `await` inside
48	export function proxy(request: NextRequest) {
49	  return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/home', request.url))
50	}
51	
52	// Alternatively, you can use a default export:
53	// export default function proxy(request: NextRequest) { ... }
54	
55	export const config = {
56	  matcher: '/about/:path*',
57	}
58	```
59	
60	```js filename="proxy.js" switcher
61	import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
62	
63	// This function can be marked `async` if using `await` inside
64	export function proxy(request) {
65	  return NextResponse.redirect(new URL('/home', request.url))
66	}
67	
68	// Alternatively, you can use a default export:
69	// export default function proxy(request) { ... }
70	
71	export const config = {
72	  matcher: '/about/:path*',
73	}
74	```
75	
76	The `matcher` config allows you to filter Proxy to run on specific paths. See the [Matcher](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/proxy#matcher) documentation for more details on path matching.
77	
78	Read more about [using `proxy`](/docs/app/guides/backend-for-frontend#proxy), or refer to the `proxy` [API reference](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/proxy).
79

2	title: rewrites
3	description: Add rewrites to your Next.js app.
4	---
5	
6	{/* The content of this doc is shared between the app and pages router. You can use the `<PagesOnly>Content</PagesOnly>` component to add content that is specific to the Pages Router. Any shared content should not be wrapped in a component. */}
7	
8	Rewrites allow you to map an incoming request path to a different destination path.
9	
10	<AppOnly>
11	
12	Rewrites act as a URL proxy and mask the destination path, making it appear the user hasn't changed their location on the site. In contrast, [redirects](/docs/app/api-reference/config/next-config-js/redirects) will reroute to a new page and show the URL changes.
13	
14	</AppOnly>
15	
16	<PagesOnly>
17	
18	Rewrites act as a URL proxy and mask the destination path, making it appear the user hasn't changed their location on the site. In contrast, [redirects](/docs/pages/api-reference/config/next-config-js/redirects) will reroute to a new page and show the URL changes.
19	
20	</PagesOnly>
21	
22	To use rewrites you can use the `rewrites` key in `next.config.js`:
23	
24	```js filename="next.config.js"
25	module.exports = {
26	  async rewrites() {
27	    return [
28	      {
29	        source: '/about',
30	        destination: '/',
31	      },
32	    ]
33	  },
34	}
35	```
36	
37	Rewrites are applied to client-side routing. In the example above, navigating to `<Link href="/about">` will serve content from `/` while keeping the URL as `/about`.
38	
39	`rewrites` is an async function that expects to return either an array or an object of arrays (see below) holding objects with `source` and `destination` properties:
40	
41	- `source`: `String` - is the incoming request path pattern.
42	- `destination`: `String` is the path you want to route to.
43	- `basePath`: `false` or `undefined` - if false the basePath won't be included when matching, can be used for external rewrites only.
44	- `locale`: `false` or `undefined` - whether the locale should not be included when matching.
45	- `has` is an array of [has objects](#header-cookie-and-query-matching) with the `type`, `key` and `value` properties.
46	- `missing` is an array of [missing objects](#header-cookie-and-query-matching) with the `type`, `key` and `value` properties.
47	
48	When the `rewrites` function returns an array, rewrites are applied after checking the filesystem (pages and `/public` files) and before dynamic routes. When the `rewrites` function returns an object of arrays with a specific shape, this behavior can be changed and more finely controlled, as of `v10.1` of Next.js:
49	
50	```js filename="next.config.js"
51	module.exports = {
52	  async rewrites() {
53	    return {
54	      beforeFiles: [
55	        // These rewrites are checked after headers/redirects
56	        // and before all files including _next/public files which
57	        // allows overriding page files
58	        {
59	          source: '/some-page',
60	          destination: '/somewhere-else',
61	          has: [{ type: 'query', key: 'overrideMe' }],
62	        },
63	      ],
64	      afterFiles: [
65	        // These rewrites are checked after pages/public files
66	        // are checked but before dynamic routes
67	        {
68	          source: '/non-existent',
69	          destination: '/somewhere-else',
70	        },
71	      ],
72	      fallback: [
73	        // These rewrites are checked after both pages/public files
74	        // and dynamic routes are checked
75	        {
76	          source: '/:path*',
77	          destination: `https://my-old-site.com/:path*`,
78	        },
79	      ],
80	    }
81	  },
82	}
83	```
84	
85	> **Good to know**: rewrites in `beforeFiles` do not check the filesystem/dynamic routes immediately after matching a source, they continue until all `beforeFiles` have been checked.
86	
87	The order Next.js routes are checked is:
88	
89	<AppOnly>
90	
91	1. [headers](/docs/app/api-reference/config/next-config-js/headers) are checked/applied
92	2. [redirects](/docs/app/api-reference/config/next-config-js/redirects) are checked/applied
93	3. [proxy](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/proxy)
94	4. `beforeFiles` rewrites are checked/applied
95	5. static files from the [public directory](/docs/app/api-reference/file-conventions/public-folder), `_next/static` files, and non-dynamic pages are checked/served
96	6. `afterFiles` rewrites are checked/applied, if one of these rewrites is matched we check dynamic routes/static files after each match
97	7. `fallback` rewrites are checked/applied, these are applied before rendering the 404 page and after dynamic routes/all static assets have been checked. If you use [fallback: true/'blocking'](/docs/pages/api-reference/functions/get-static-paths#fallback-true) in `getStaticPaths`, the fallback `rewrites` defined in your `next.config.js` will _not_ be run.
98	
99	</AppOnly>
100	
101	<PagesOnly>
102	
103	1. [headers](/docs/pages/api-reference/config/next-config-js/headers) are checked/applied
104	2. [redirects](/docs/pages/api-reference/config/next-config-js/redirects) are checked/applied

実装方針を先にまとめます。

**フロー（PKCE、auth-go 不使用）:**
1. `/api/auth/oauth` (Next rewrite → API) → API で PKCE 生成、`pkce_verifier` Cookie を付与、Supabase `/auth/v1/authorize` に 302（`redirect_to={WEB_URL}/api/auth/callback`）
2. Supabase → `{WEB_URL}/api/auth/callback?code=...` → Next rewrite → API
3. API が `pkce_verifier` Cookie と code を使い Supabase `/auth/v1/token?grant_type=pkce` を HTTP 直叩きで交換
4. users upsert（user_id = Supabase の `sub`）→ `jukubox_jwt` Cookie (HttpOnly) 設定 → `/` に 302

Cookie は Web と API が同一ドメイン（rewrite 経由）前提で `Domain` 省略（jukubox.net デフォルト、dev は localhost）。

ではファイル作成に入ります。

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	authlib "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	authroutes "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/commands"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, envOrDefault("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	supabaseURL := requireEnv("SUPABASE_URL")
	supabaseAnonKey := requireEnv("SUPABASE_ANON_KEY")
	_ = requireEnv("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET") // 検証用途で利用するミドルウェア配線時に参照
	webOrigin := requireEnv("WEB_ORIGIN") // 例: https://jukubox.net or http://localhost:60000
	secureCookie := os.Getenv("COOKIE_SECURE") != "false"

	supabase := authlib.NewSupabaseClient(supabaseURL, supabaseAnonKey)
	userRepo := authroutes.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)

	oauthHandler := authroutes.NewOAuthHandler(supabase, webOrigin+"/api/auth/callback", secureCookie)
	callbackHandler := authroutes.NewCallbackHandler(supabase, userRepo, webOrigin+"/", secureCookie)
	logoutHandler := authroutes.NewLogoutHandler(supabase, secureCookie)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	enrollHandler := commands.NewHandler(commands.NewEnrollCourseUsecase(commands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), commands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(q)))

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/oauth", oauthHandler.StartOAuth)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/callback", callbackHandler.HandleCallback)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/logout", logoutHandler.Logout)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/courses/{courseId}/enrollment", enrollHandler.PostEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

func requireEnv(key string) string {
	v := os.Getenv(key)
	if v == "" {
		log.Fatalf("environment variable %s is required", key)
	}
	return v
}

func envOrDefault(key, fallback string) string {
	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
		return v
	}
	return fallback
}

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	authlib "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	authroutes "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/commands"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, envOrDefault("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	supabaseURL := requireEnv("SUPABASE_URL")
	supabaseAnonKey := requireEnv("SUPABASE_ANON_KEY")
	_ = requireEnv("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET") // 保護ルート配線時に JWTVerifier で利用
	webOrigin := requireEnv("WEB_ORIGIN")
	secureCookie := os.Getenv("COOKIE_SECURE") != "false"

	supabase := authlib.NewSupabaseClient(supabaseURL, supabaseAnonKey)
	userRepo := authroutes.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)

	oauthHandler := authroutes.NewOAuthHandler(supabase, webOrigin+"/api/auth/callback", secureCookie)
	callbackHandler := authroutes.NewCallbackHandler(supabase, userRepo, webOrigin+"/", secureCookie)
	logoutHandler := authroutes.NewLogoutHandler(supabase, secureCookie)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	enrollHandler := commands.NewHandler(commands.NewEnrollCourseUsecase(commands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), commands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(q)))

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/oauth", oauthHandler.StartOAuth)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/callback", callbackHandler.HandleCallback)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/logout", logoutHandler.Logout)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/courses/{courseId}/enrollment", enrollHandler.PostEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

func requireEnv(key string) string {
	v := os.Getenv(key)
	if v == "" {
		log.Fatalf("environment variable %s is required", key)
	}
	return v
}

func envOrDefault(key, fallback string) string {
	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
		return v
	}
	return fallback
}

実装完了しました。

**追加/変更したファイル:**

API (`apps/api`):
- `queries/users.sql` — UpsertUser クエリ + sqlc 生成
- `lib/auth/pkce.go` — PKCE verifier/challenge/state 生成
- `lib/auth/supabase.go` — Supabase Auth HTTP クライアント（authorize URL, PKCE token exchange, logout）
- `lib/auth/jwt.go` — HS256 JWT 検証
- `lib/auth/middleware.go` — JWT 検証ミドルウェア + AuthCookieName
- `routes/auth/{oauth,callback,logout}.handler.go`
- `routes/auth/user.sqrc-repository.go`
- `main.go` — 配線 + 必須 env 読込

Web (`apps/web`):
- `next.config.ts` — `/api/:path*` → `${API_ORIGIN}/v1/:path*` rewrite
- `app/login/page.tsx` — 「Google でログイン」
- `proxy.ts` — 未認証者を /login へ（Next 16 では middleware.ts → proxy.ts）

**必要な環境変数（API）:** `SUPABASE_URL`, `SUPABASE_ANON_KEY`, `SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET`, `WEB_ORIGIN`, 任意 `COOKIE_SECURE=false`（ローカル用）

**残課題（別チケット/後続対応推奨）:**
- 認証ミドルウェアを既存の保護ルート（apikeys 等）へ適用
- small/medium テスト追加（カバレッジ 80% 達成）
- Supabase ダッシュボード側の redirect allow list 設定、Google Provider の有効化
- Vercel Lab emulate でのローカル OAuth 動作確認
- E2E（playwright-cli）でのブラウザ動作確認

.PHONY: dev migrate-up test-all test-coverage test-coverage-show

DATABASE_URL ?= postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable

help:

dev:
	mkdir -p ./tmp && GOTMPDIR=$(CURDIR)/tmp GOCACHE=$(CURDIR)/tmp/go-cache go tool air

migrate-up:
	migrate -path ./migrations -database "$(DATABASE_URL)" up

db-reset:
	docker compose down -v
	docker compose up -d --wait
	make migrate-up

query-generate:

test-all:

	@go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$$3); if ($$3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $$3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $$3 "%"}}'

	@echo "make dev: 開発サーバー起動（ホットリロード付き）"

content.text:
`make dev-api` で API に必要な環境変数を自動設定するようにしました。

**追加した環境変数（デフォルト値）:**
- `SUPABASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:54321`
- `REDACTED`（提示された publishable key）
- `REDACTED`（supabase CLI のデフォルト JWT secret）
- `WEB_ORIGIN=http://localhost:60000`
- `COOKIE_SECURE=false`（ローカル HTTP 用）

`?=` で定義しているのでシェル側で上書き可能、`export` で子プロセス（air / go run）に伝搬します。

**確認点:**
- `SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET` は supabase local の標準値を入れていますが、お手元の `supabase/config.toml` や `supabase status --output env` の `JWT_SECRET` と一致しているか確認してください（一致しないと JWT 検証が失敗します）
- DATABASE_URL は既存どおり `postgres:password@localhost:5432` のまま（supabase local の 54322 ではない）なので、そちらを使う場合は `make dev-api DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres?sslmode=disable` 等で上書きできます

package main

import (
	"context"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"

	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/internal/db"
	authlib "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/lib/auth"
	authroutes "github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/auth"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/commands"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/courses/queries"
	"github.com/harusame0616/ijuku/apps/api/routes/users/settings/apikeys"
	"github.com/jackc/pgx/v5/pgxpool"
)

func main() {
	ctx := context.Background()
	pool, err := pgxpool.New(ctx, envOrDefault("DATABASE_URL", "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres"))
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatal(err)
	}
	defer pool.Close()

	q := db.New(pool)

	supabaseURL := requireEnv("SUPABASE_URL")
	supabaseAnonKey := requireEnv("SUPABASE_ANON_KEY")
	_ = requireEnv("SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET") // 保護ルート配線時に JWTVerifier で利用
	webOrigin := requireEnv("WEB_ORIGIN")
	secureCookie := os.Getenv("COOKIE_SECURE") != "false"

	supabase := authlib.NewSupabaseClient(supabaseURL, supabaseAnonKey)
	userRepo := authroutes.NewUserSqrcRepository(q)

	oauthHandler := authroutes.NewOAuthHandler(supabase, webOrigin+"/api/auth/callback", secureCookie)
	callbackHandler := authroutes.NewCallbackHandler(supabase, userRepo, webOrigin+"/", secureCookie)
	logoutHandler := authroutes.NewLogoutHandler(supabase, secureCookie)

	coursesHandler := queries.NewCoursesHandlers(q)
	enrollHandler := commands.NewHandler(commands.NewEnrollCourseUsecase(commands.NewSqrcCourseRepository(q), commands.NewSqrcUserTopicProgressRepository(q)))
	topicDetailHandler := queries.NewTopicDetailHandler(q)
	apikeysHandler := apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyHandler(apikeys.NewGenerateApiKeyUsecase(apikeys.NewApiKeySqrcRepository(q)))

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/oauth", oauthHandler.StartOAuth)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/auth/callback", callbackHandler.HandleCallback)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/auth/logout", logoutHandler.Logout)

	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses", coursesHandler.GetCoursesHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/courses/{courseId}/enrollment", enrollHandler.PostEnrollmentHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("GET /v1/courses/{courseId}/sections/{sectionId}/topics/{topicId}", topicDetailHandler.GetTopicDetailHandler)
	http.HandleFunc("POST /v1/users/{userID}/apikeys", apikeysHandler.GenerateApiKeyHandler)

	log.Println("Server starting on :8080")
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

func requireEnv(key string) string {
	v := os.Getenv(key)
	if v == "" {
		log.Fatalf("environment variable %s is required", key)
	}
	return v
}

func envOrDefault(key, fallback string) string {
	if v := os.Getenv(key); v != "" {
		return v
	}
	return fallback
}

content.content:
1	name: API テスト
2	
3	on:
4	  pull_request:
5	    branches: [main]
6	
7	permissions:
8	  contents: read
9	
10	concurrency:
11	  group: api-test-${{ github.ref }}
12	  cancel-in-progress: true
13	
14	jobs:
15	  api-test:
16	    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
17	    timeout-minutes: 10
18	    defaults:
19	      run:
20	        working-directory: apps/api
21	
22	    steps:
23	      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
24	        uses: actions/checkout@v4
25	
26	      - name: 変更ファイルのチェック
27	        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v4
28	        id: filter
29	        with:
30	          predicate-quantifier: every
31	          filters: |
32	            api:
33	              - apps/api/**
34	              - '!apps/api/**/*.md'
35	              - '!apps/api/sqlc.yaml'
36	              - '!apps/api/queries/**'
37	              - '!apps/api/.air.toml'
38	              - '!apps/api/.gitignore'
39	              - '!apps/api/.claude/**'
40	            compose:
41	              - compose.yml
42	
43	      - name: 実行要否の判定
44	        id: should-run
45	        run: echo "result=${{ steps.filter.outputs.api == 'true' || steps.filter.outputs.compose == 'true' }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
46	
47	      - name: PostgreSQL の起動
48	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
49	        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
50	        run: docker compose up -d db
51	
52	      - name: PostgreSQL の起動待機
53	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
54	        run: |
55	          until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres; do
56	            sleep 1
57	          done
58	
59	      - name: Go のセットアップ
60	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
61	        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
62	        with:
63	          go-version-file: apps/api/go.mod
64	          cache: true
65	
66	      - name: golang-migrate のインストール
67	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
68	        run: go install -tags 'postgres' github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/cmd/migrate@latest
69	
70	      - name: マイグレーションの実行
71	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
72	        env:
73	          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable
74	        run: make migrate-up
75	
76	      - name: テストの実行
77	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
78	        run: |
79	          go mod download
80	          make test-all
81	
82	      - name: カバレッジのチェック
83	        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
84	        # make check-coverage はテストも内部で実行するため、前ステップと二重実行になるのを避け直接コマンドを使用
85	        run: |
86	          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$3); if ($3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $3 "%"}}'

file.content:
name: API テスト

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: api-test-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  api-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: apps/api

    steps:
      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: 変更ファイルのチェック
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v4
        id: filter
        with:
          predicate-quantifier: every
          filters: |
            api:
              - apps/api/**
              - '!apps/api/**/*.md'
              - '!apps/api/sqlc.yaml'
              - '!apps/api/queries/**'
              - '!apps/api/.air.toml'
              - '!apps/api/.gitignore'
              - '!apps/api/.claude/**'
            compose:
              - compose.yml

      - name: 実行要否の判定
        id: should-run
        run: echo "result=${{ steps.filter.outputs.api == 'true' || steps.filter.outputs.compose == 'true' }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: PostgreSQL の起動
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
        run: docker compose up -d db

      - name: PostgreSQL の起動待機
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: |
          until pg_isready -h localhost -p 5432 -U postgres; do
            sleep 1
          done

      - name: Go のセットアップ
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: apps/api/go.mod
          cache: true

      - name: golang-migrate のインストール
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: go install -tags 'postgres' github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/cmd/migrate@latest

      - name: マイグレーションの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        env:
          DATABASE_URL: postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable
        run: make migrate-up

      - name: テストの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: |
          go mod download
          make test-all

      - name: カバレッジのチェック
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        # make check-coverage はテストも内部で実行するため、前ステップと二重実行になるのを避け直接コマンドを使用
        run: |
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$3); if ($3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $3 "%"}}'

# GitHub Action 実装ガイドライン

GitHub Actions ワークフローは以下のルールに従うこと。

## 必須設定

### ステップ名の日本語化

各ステップに日本語でわかりやすい name をつける

### pnpm バージョン

`pnpm/action-setup` で version を省略する

### actions/setup-node

node-version-file で .node-version を指定する

### concurrency 設定

原則的に concurrency を設定し、重複実行を防ぐ
設定しない場合はその理由をコメントで残す

```yaml
concurrency:
  group: <workflow-name>-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true
```

### タイムアウト設定

各ジョブには最低 10 分のタイムアウトを設定する

### Permission 設定

ワークフローレベルで permission ブロックを設定し、最小限の権限を付与する

### 不要なワークフローのスキップ

ワークフローと関連ない変更の場合は必ずワークフローの実行をスキップする
スキップが不要な場合はスキップが不要な理由を冒頭にコメントで記載すること
新たに作成する際に「Require status checks to pass」に登録するかどうかユーザーから明示されない場合は登録する前提で作成すること
フィルター条件を書く際は以下を調査し、ワークフローの処理内容に無関係なファイル・フォルダは除外すること

#### 「Require status checks to pass」に設定するジョブの場合

dorny/paths-filter を使用する
変更のチェックとワークフローの処理は同じジョブ内に記載し、 if で制御する
デフォルトでフィルター条件は or 条件のため、フィルターの条件を AND 条件にしたい場合は predicate-quantifier に every を指定する

#### 「Require status checks to pass」に設定しないジョブの場合

Github Actions 標準の paths, paths-ignore を設定する

        run: go install -tags 'postgres' github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/cmd/migrate@latest

      - name: マイグレーションの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: make migrate-up

      - name: テストの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: |
          go mod download
          make test-all

      - name: カバレッジのチェック
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        # make check-coverage はテストも内部で実行するため、前ステップと二重実行になるのを避け直接コマンドを使用
        run: |
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$3); if ($3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $3 "%"}}'

file.content:
name: マイグレーションテスト

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: migration-test-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  migration-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10

    services:
      postgres:
        image: postgres:18
        env:
          POSTGRES_USER: postgres
          POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
          POSTGRES_DB: postgres
        ports:
          - 5432:5432
        options: >-
          --health-cmd pg_isready
          --health-interval 10s
          --health-timeout 5s
          --health-retries 5

    steps:
      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: 変更ファイルのチェック
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v4
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            migrations:
              - apps/api/migrations/**

      - name: golang-migrate のインストール
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        run: |
          curl -L https://github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/releases/download/v4.18.1/migrate.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar xvz
          sudo mv migrate /usr/local/bin/migrate

      - name: マイグレーションの実行
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        run: |
          migrate -path apps/api/migrations \
            -database "postgresql://postgres:password@localhost:5432/postgres?sslmode=disable" \
            up

export WEB_ORIGIN
export COOKIE_SECURE

help:
	@echo "make dev: 開発サーバー起動（ホットリロード付き）"
	@echo "make migrate-up: マイグレーション実行"
	@echo "make test-all: 全テスト実行（カバレッジ付き）"
	@echo "make test-coverage: カバレッジが80%以上かチェック"
	@echo "make test-coverage-show: カバレッジをブラウザで表示"

dev:
	mkdir -p ./tmp && GOTMPDIR=$(CURDIR)/tmp GOCACHE=$(CURDIR)/tmp/go-cache go tool air

migrate-up:
	migrate -path ./migrations -database "$(DATABASE_URL)" up

db-reset:
	pnpm dlx supabase db reset

query-generate:
	sqlc generate

test-all:
	go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./...

test-coverage-show: test-all
	go tool cover -html=coverage.out

test-coverage:
	@go test -coverpkg=./... -coverprofile=coverage.out ./... > /dev/null 2>&1 || (echo "NG: テスト失敗"; exit 1)
	@go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$$3); if ($$3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $$3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $$3 "%"}}'

content.text: `supabase db reset` でDBをリセット後、`$(MAKE) migrate-up` で golang-migrate を実行するようにしました。

toolUseResult.originalFile:
name: API テスト

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: api-test-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  api-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 10
    defaults:
      run:
        working-directory: apps/api

    steps:
      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: 変更ファイルのチェック
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v4
        id: filter
        with:
          predicate-quantifier: every
          filters: |
            api:
              - apps/api/**
              - '!apps/api/**/*.md'
              - '!apps/api/sqlc.yaml'
              - '!apps/api/queries/**'
              - '!apps/api/.air.toml'
              - '!apps/api/.gitignore'
              - '!apps/api/.claude/**'
            supabase:
              - supabase/**

      - name: 実行要否の判定
        id: should-run
        run: echo "result=${{ steps.filter.outputs.api == 'true' || steps.filter.outputs.supabase == 'true' }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Supabase CLI のセットアップ
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        uses: supabase/setup-cli@v1

      - name: Supabase の起動
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        working-directory: ${{ github.workspace }}
        run: supabase start

      - name: Go のセットアップ
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version-file: apps/api/go.mod
          cache: true

      - name: golang-migrate のインストール
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: go install -tags 'postgres' github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/v4/cmd/migrate@latest

      - name: マイグレーションの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: make migrate-up

      - name: テストの実行
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        run: |
          go mod download
          make test-all

      - name: カバレッジのチェック
        if: steps.should-run.outputs.result == 'true'
        # make check-coverage はテストも内部で実行するため、前ステップと二重実行になるのを避け直接コマンドを使用
        run: |
          go tool cover -func=coverage.out | tail -1 | awk '{gsub(/%/,"",$3); if ($3+0 < 80) {print "NG: " $3 "% < 80%"; exit 1} else {print "OK: " $3 "%"}}'

toolUseResult.originalFile:
name: マイグレーションテスト

on:
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

permissions:
  contents: read

concurrency:
  group: migration-test-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  migration-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 15

    steps:
      - name: リポジトリのチェックアウト
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: 変更ファイルのチェック
        uses: dorny/paths-filter@v4
        id: filter
        with:
          filters: |
            migrations:
              - apps/api/migrations/**
              - supabase/**

      - name: Supabase CLI のセットアップ
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        uses: supabase/setup-cli@v1

      - name: Supabase の起動
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        run: supabase start

      - name: golang-migrate のインストール
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        run: |
          curl -L https://github.com/golang-migrate/migrate/releases/download/v4.18.1/migrate.linux-amd64.tar.gz | tar xvz
          sudo mv migrate /usr/local/bin/migrate

      - name: マイグレーションの実行
        if: steps.filter.outputs.migrations == 'true'
        run: |
          migrate -path apps/api/migrations \
            -database "postgresql://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:54322/postgres?sslmode=disable" \
            up
